fixes.replacement:
query = (
    "SELECT u.id, u.email "
    "FROM users u "
    "WHERE EXISTS("
    "  SELECT 1 FROM user_flags f "
    "  WHERE f.user_id = u.id AND f.flag = ?"
    ")"
)

cur.execute(query, (flag,))
